final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing environment concept art for a post-apocalyptic wasteland scene.

Style/medium: needs a post-apocalyptic wasteland aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: 
Subject: must include a modified armored vehicle
Scene/backdrop: must include a desolate desert with collapsed city ruins in the distance, dusty yellow sky, sandstorm atmosphere
Lighting/mood: needs an apocalyptic survival tension atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a dusty yellow/dusky direction — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
